title: Favorite Eva Art Fanart
wikitext:
[]: Favorite Eva Art/Fanart?             Quote Post by glitz2hard » Tue Aug 25, 2020 11:19 am I was wondering what some of y'all's favorite art from the series is (fan art or legitimate art from the show/movie). Of course, the art should probably be the right aesthetic for EoE, considering I'm going to use one of these for the cover art (and back art) for a custom EoE vinyl I'm ordering. But it doesn't have to be . I also just really wanna see some of your favorite art! Also, if you guys are interested in ordering a copy yourself, mine's running for 75 bucks or so. If you need the information, just PM me. Here are some images I think are cool (basic bitch incoming)! SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Favorite Eva Art/Fanart?             Quote Post by Berserker » Fri Aug 28, 2020 12:31 am Binge through the pic threads for fanarts. It will never end. Can't tell about official arts though.

[]: Re: Favorite Eva Art/Fanart?             Quote Post by glitz2hard » Tue Sep 15, 2020 11:24 am (i was asking for opinions, not favors. bruh)

[]: Re: Favorite Eva Art/Fanart?             Quote Post by Berserker » Thu Sep 17, 2020 12:15 pm Yeah,i know that. But since 95% people on this community is offline nowadays,you won't get a lot(maybe never) of opinions/answers. However,most people posted many fanarts in the early days and mentioned their favourite ones in the pic threads(I've read through 3 threads). Whatever,since you asked- favourite fanarts  SPOILER: Show
